predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second person.

predicates.name: is_household_good
predicates.description: The asset is a household good.

predicates.name: served_as_principal_family_dwelling_at_succession_opening
predicates.description: The asset served as the family's principal dwelling at the opening of the succession of the person.

predicates.name: present_in_asset_at_succession_opening
predicates.description: The first asset was present in the second asset at the opening of the succession of the person.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a right of legal reversion.

predicates.name: has_usufruct_right_over
predicates.description: The person has the legal usufruct right over the asset.
